prompt: Our database has accumulated months of corrupted data across multiple tables. Foreign key constraints are violated, orphaned records everywhere, and performance has degraded 60%. I need a comprehensive restoration plan.
The API is returning 500 errors because of a null pointer exception in the order processing code. Something in the last deploy introduced a bug. I need the code fixed and a hotfix deployed.
There's a persistent enchantment on our logging system — some magical process is injecting garbage data into every log line. I need to identify and dispel whatever is causing the corruption.

I need to remove a cursed dependency from our project. The library we imported 6 months ago has been silently degrading our performance, introducing memory leaks, and conflicting with other packages. Full removal and replacement.
Our Nginx config file has a missing semicolon on line 45. The config test fails. Just fix the syntax error so nginx reloads.

Our entire authentication system needs to be rebuilt — the current one uses deprecated crypto, has known vulnerabilities, and doesn't support MFA. This isn't a toggle or a reset, it's a full redesign.
